text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet calls me in to watch her dance
lesson.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: One, two, three, four! One, two, three, four!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Obviously. But just "good" won't cut it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Becoming number one is all that matters. A
hundred percent isn't enough—I need to give a
thousand percent.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: No criticism is too small. Tell it to me straight.
choice_data_list: Try to push yourself to your limit.
Try to be more expressive with your hands.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: My limit? What do you mean?
choice_data_list: Picture how you feel after a race.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...Oh! Now I get it. My concerts are after my
races... After I've run myself to exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So you're saying that it's important to practice
like it's the real thing.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'll keep going until I hit my breaking point!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satisfied with her new challenge, Daiwa Scarlet
dances until nightfall.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I've only been focused on the overall
motions of my limbs.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But if I channel speed through to the very tips of
my fingers... Yeah, that could work.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That tip isn't half bad. I'll give it a shot. Come
back and watch once I've got it down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet seems pleased at finding a new way
to improve her dance.
